commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=fea6f25974b6c6f47e2377c318fca7192bf9d026)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an early Codex app-server prompt transcript mirror using the existing `turnId:prompt` identity and a regression test for deduping with the final mirror.

Reproducibility: yes. from source for the review finding. Current main uses `contextSessionKey` for the final mirror, while the PR's early mirror uses `sandboxSessionKey`; I did not run a live Codex/WebChat turn in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Human follow-up is needed because the PR still has a session-key routing defect and the contributor must supply real behavior proof from the current head.

target.title: fix(codex): mirror accepted prompts early
target.body:
## Summary
- Mirror the accepted Codex app-server user prompt as soon as the turn has a stable id.
- Reuse the existing `turnId:prompt` mirror identity and thread-scoped idempotency so the final transcript mirror dedupes the prompt.
- Add a regression test that checks the session transcript contains the user message before turn completion and still only has one user row after final mirroring.
- Resolved the merge conflict with current `main` and refreshed the PR at head `4f1f5db15c803a5793aa9980df5e52e5be9175fa`.

Fixes #83528

## Proof
- Conflict resolution: merged current `origin/main` into `fix/issue-83528` and resolved `extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.test.ts` by keeping current main and reapplying the PR regression test.
- Production path present: `extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.ts` still imports `attachCodexMirrorIdentity`, calls `mirrorAcceptedPromptBestEffort`, and writes the accepted prompt with `turnId:prompt` identity before turn completion.
- Formatting: `git diff --check` passed.
- Targeted regression: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.test.ts --run --testNamePattern "mirrors the accepted prompt before Codex turn completion"` passed on the refreshed head.
- GitHub CI: passed on head `4f1f5db15c803a5793aa9980df5e52e5be9175fa`.

## Real behavior proof

- behavior: The Codex app-server run attempt mirrors the accepted user prompt into the session transcript as soon as the turn has a stable id, before Codex turn completion. The final transcript mirror still dedupes the same user prompt through the existing `turnId:prompt` identity and thread-scoped idempotency key.

- environment: Local checkout of PR head `4f1f5db15c`; Node `v26.0.0`; pnpm `11.2.2`; OS `Linux rev 6.19.14+kali-amd64 #1 SMP PREEMPT_DYNAMIC Kali 6.19.14-1+kali1 (2026-05-05) x86_64 GNU/Linux`.

- steps:
  1. Merged current `origin/main` into `fix/issue-83528`.
  2. Resolved the conflict in `extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.test.ts` by keeping current main and reapplying the PR regression test.
  3. Verified the production mirror path remains present in `extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.ts`.
  4. Ran `git diff --check` from the refreshed head.
  5. Ran the targeted regression from the refreshed head.
  6. Pushed refreshed head `4f1f5db15c803a5793aa9980df5e52e5be9175fa` and verified GitHub CI passed.

- evidence:

      $ git diff --check

      $ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.test.ts --run --testNamePattern "mirrors the accepted prompt before Codex turn completion"

      RUN  v4.1.7 /home/rev/projects/openclaw-pr-84652-conflict

      ✓ extensions ../../extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.test.ts (215 tests | 214 skipped) 524ms
        ✓ mirrors the accepted prompt before Codex turn completion 517ms

      Test Files 1 passed (1)
      Tests 1 passed | 214 skipped (215)
      Duration 35.52s

- observedResult: The merge conflict is resolved. The PR is mergeable at refreshed head `4f1f5db15c803a5793aa9980df5e52e5be9175fa`. The prompt mirror production change and regression test are present. The targeted regression confirms the prompt is mirrored before Codex turn completion and remains deduped after final mirroring. GitHub CI passed on the refreshed head.

- notTested: Did not run a full live Codex app-server turn against a real model provider. Did not test the `mirrorAcceptedPromptBestEffort` error catch path. Did not test concurrent prompt mirroring from multiple Codex threads.
target.author: jason-allen-oneal

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
